description: Golden set for evaluator calibration. Each case has known-quality code and expected evaluator behavior.

cases.description: Clean, minimal one-line fix that passes all tests
cases.evaluator_should: Give high scores across all criteria

cases.description: Fix that introduces a new bug (regression)
cases.evaluator_should: Detect the regression and score below threshold

cases.description: Fix that works but rewrites half the codebase unnecessarily
cases.evaluator_should: Penalize code_quality for unnecessary changes but pass on functionality

cases.description: Fix that resolves 1 of 2 failing tests
cases.evaluator_should: Acknowledge partial progress but FAIL due to remaining test failure

cases.description: Fix that makes tests pass by modifying the test expectations rather than fixing the code
cases.evaluator_should: Detect that tests were modified instead of code and FAIL with a bug report

cases.description: Obviously broken code where tests fail — evaluator MUST not give scores above 5
cases.evaluator_should: Give harsh scores. If all scores >= 7, evaluator is rubber-stamping (people-pleasing)
